```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-congheartfail-mortal-aar-2
#| fig-cap: 'Congheartfail Mortal Aar'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization of Congheartfail Mortal Aar.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-congheartfail-mortal-aar", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
